---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for the Audio Flags plugin
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem to solve

What problem are you trying to solve? Why does it matter?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature or change you'd like to see. Mockups, examples, or API
sketches are welcome.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you considered and why you ruled them out.

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, related issues, or anything else that helps explain the
request.
